# Azure DevOps Docs — Copilot Instructions

This is the `MicrosoftDocs/azure-devops-docs` repository. Content is written in Markdown and published to `https://learn.microsoft.com/azure/devops/`.

## Key conventions
- Use "Azure DevOps" — never abbreviate to "ADO" or "AZDO".
- Capitalize service names: **Azure Boards**, **Azure Repos**, **Azure Pipelines**, **Azure Artifacts**, **Azure Test Plans**.
- Primary moniker: `azure-devops` (cloud). Include `azure-devops-2022` for on-premises. Discard `tfs-2018` content.
- Every article needs YAML front matter with `title`, `description`, `ms.date`, and `ms.topic` (always required). `ms.service: azure-devops`, `author`, and `ms.author` have defaults set in `docfx.json` and can be omitted unless overriding.
